title: Device Home Screen - End-of-Life Support After End Life Date
scenario: End-of-life device shows green connection status with red info icon, and tapping the icon displays a pop-up stating support is no longer available.
steps: 1. Ensure the device has passed its End Life Date.
2. Observe the home screen for the device.
3. Check for a green connection status ring on the home screen.
4. Check for a red 'i' icon in the top right corner of the home screen.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Verify the pop-up displays the message: 'Support for this device is no longer available.'
8. Tap outside the pop-up to close it.
expected: After the End Life Date, the home screen shows a green connection status ring and a red "i" icon. Tapping the "i" icon displays a pop-up: "Support for this device is no longer available." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
